Slot: FACE
AC: 5
CHA: +10 INT: +4 MANA: +5
SV MAGIC: +5
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Slot: FACE
AC: 5
CHA: +10 INT: +4 MANA: +5
SV MAGIC: +5

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 32

# Feb 05 2006 at 8:35 AM Rating: Decent

Why is it that when Varant get's it right by revamping Befallen for higher levels that they change their minds and nerf it?

I finally see some promise in Befallen for a decent Enchanter Veil and they change it. Very disappointed

Rhodderick

▲ Page top
Nerfed
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2001 at 6:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249834957
8 posts
As of now, this item no longer drops.

Befallen has been reverted to its earlier state. I was there camping this veil. After 36+ hours and 30+ weavers and no veil.

While camping a GM suddenly said in befallen, REPOP in 5 mins, move to a safe spot... I moved after I finished off 4 place holders. The GM repoped the zone, and there WAS NOT a single bat or Dark Elf to be seen "besides the shadowknights that have keys".


So atleast on Quellious this zone, has been nerfed.

-Erana Dragonfire, Quellious
▲ Page top
who?
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2001 at 11:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757770884
10 posts
What did this drop off of and what lvl are they?

QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 8:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766369886
1 post
As of August 23, 2001, the mask of the vortex weaver just dropped in Befallen on Xev.

This was after a patch, I went on did a track, saw it on track, and got one for enchanter, who is delighted now :)

▲ Page top
Got one, easy
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2001 at 7:25 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Remember the first day that befallen was changed? well i just HAD to go check that nasty place out and see what the n00bs had in store for them. we'll this was about 25mins after the new patch had been in place and the servers up and running (20mins travel time, 5 mins lookn fer a port). Well there i was walkn through the pile of re-dead when i finially got downstairs. killed a few with ease due to my ubah chantah pet at 44 (go Jebeker GO!) just for fun i decided to check the corpses to see if the loot table had been changed....POOF! i almost fainted when i saw that viel considering i was wearing a plat star ruby one. So i'm thinkn it's pretty safe to say that i was the first one to get that viel on Druzzil Ro. I called it to the zone and everyone came runnin :) i feel special. Thnx to Mythus for controlling some of that nasty spell interupting aggro on me.

Lunalia Silvermoon <1st Fist of Light>
Enchanter of the 44th Circle
Grand Master Jeweler
Grand Master Gater. ;)

Btw Some pristine bracer of errolis marr or summn like that droped on me to, gave it to the ranger...or was she a druid?
▲ Page top
Verant strikes again...
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 11:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756848384
3 posts
If they took out the best drops that were dropping out of the New Befallen, what is the point of walking in and getting attacked by 10 or so greenies? Really makes me wanna waste my time in Befallen now. Great going, Verant.
▲ Page top
Nerfed
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2001 at 1:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I believe they have removed this drop, as well as the Primordial Ritualist sceptr and robe.

No drop out of last 10 spawns. Others had heard that they were removing these items.
▲ Page top
Rare, Not Common.
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 12:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752302213
27 posts
Common Drop are stones (malichite, onyx, aggets).

The Veil is a Rare, Very Rare drop. I have only seen one drop in the past 2 weeks. I had to kill 15 weavers before I found it.
▲ Page top
Not Nerfed / RARE Drop
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 12:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752302213
27 posts
Woot. Dropped last night from weaver. I had spent the past two weeks camping on and off and it dropped off the 15th weaver I killed.

It is a rare and random drop. It didnt drop on the 14 weavers I had killed prior. With 9 potential place holders, it can either be a quick or a long a painful camp.

Would not drop it
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2001 at 9:12 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I spent 10 hours at this spawn and saw The Vortex Weaver only twice. Both times he dropped nothing. Has anyone got it to drop recently? A mage that was down there before me said that it was taken out when they patched Befallen recently. Is this true?
▲ Page top
RE: Would not drop it
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2001 at 11:54 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Was down this weekend on Drinal camping the 3rd floor. I was there for a total of 10hours and there were otheres that had been there for about 12 hours prior. Weaver spawned only a total of 3 times and only dropped coins.

It is a very rare spawn, with a very rare drop. I have have not heard anyone getting this since the change back. They may have removed it (and GMs cannot comment on it).

Befallen changes again

# Jul 09 2001 at 12:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756848384
3 posts
Looks like whatever event happened in Befallen to cause the new drops is over. All spawns are back to the same old stuff. I guess if you didnt get the no drop items last week you are outta luck. im kinda mad about that, cuz Im never got my veil after several days of camping the vortex weaver.

LUCKY DOG
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2001 at 12:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757429551
View User Forum
3 posts
WOW I must be Hella Lucky I dropped down the well and wandered the 3rd floor and this was the 4trh Kill I made and dropped the veil. I know that 3 other guildies got one the same night as well. its a great chanter item with +10 CHA
▲ Page top
Spawn point IS Static
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2001 at 8:04 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have this veil, but like others here it took me 16 + hours to get it. I killed everything and anything that moved, but only saw the Vortex Weaver three times in total, and twice he had nothing. He does indeed spawn only in the little room that spawns 2 bats, infront of the Priest room. Read: NOT THE PRIEST ROOM ITSELF.

Additional Information:

Icon looks like a cloth veil :/
Spawn time is 14 mintues
95% of the time a PH spawns (vortex caller)
Veil appears to be a rare drop (either that or I'm hella unlucky)

I hope you like 'gems'!
Enchantress of Veeshan
▲ Page top
Rare, but worth it
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 12:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761933927
26 posts
With my 36 monk 36 cleric and 35 bard completely dominated the 3rd floor to get this mask and a sceptre for the cleric after 6 hours of killing everything we recieved:
Many jasper and bloodsones forthe cleric, along with a ton of malachite.
One ribcage sheild
One guardien dagger

Since our cleric was a highelf she couldn't use the sheild :( So a lowlevel shadowknight friend of ours recieved the sheild and dagger.
The night wasn't a total loss we were able to help out some others that got trapped on third floor and we actually got a prett decent amount of pp. But my monk sure would like this mask.

IMO If you are a monk don't bother with the invesment of time to get this mask. If you are an enchanter ... Why aren't you on right now camping it ?? If you are another int caster Its a real nice mask might be worth the time and you can pick up some cats eye agate while you are down there.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 02 2001 at 12:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) posted twice :/
